v.1
Lesson 15 Summary Guide
 Implement the “Avatar Conversation Cycle” in your
autoresponder sequence
o After first few messages, we then address the Avatar
objections (fears and frustrations)
 Integrate some “how-to” content into your sequence that will
add value to your Avatar
 Include case studies or success stories from other clients or
customers
o Works well if the case study answers one of your main
objections
 Feature relevant news, events or trends related to your market
 Share your relevant, personal stories to make a meaningful
impact on your prospect
o Example: My mountain biking story
o Tie story into a practical business lesson
o Stories should be aspirational
o Stories will create a personal connection and bond with
your audience over time

-- 1 of 1 --
